mapper.insert: INSERT INTO local_activity_admin (organizer_user_id, title, subtitle, category_code, description, location_text, capacity, fee_type, fee_amount, allow_waitlist, require_checkin, status, start_at, end_at, reminder_minutes,review_note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{organizerUserId}, #{title}, #{subtitle}, #{categoryCode}, #{description}, #{locationText}, #{capacity}, #{feeType}, #{feeAmount}, #{allowWaitlist}, #{requireCheckin}, #{status}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{reminderMinutes}, #{reviewNote}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, organizer_user_id, title, subtitle, category_code, description, location_text, capacity, fee_type, fee_amount, allow_waitlist, require_checkin, status, start_at, end_at, reminder_minutes, review_note, address, latitude, longitude, cover_url FROM local_activity
